docker run [image] [override commands]: create and start container from image
docker run -d [image] [override command: create and start container from image in background
docker start -a [container_id]: start new  containers and set terminal get output from container
docker exec -it [container_id] [command]: execute command inside container (-it allow רא write commands)
docker build -t [docker_id]/[name]:[vers: create image from docker file (-f => path to dockerfile)
docker-compose up: run compose from current directory (-d -> run on background)
